questions.text: Which of these is NOT one of the three R's?
questions.explanation: The three R's are Reduce, Reuse, and Recycle. Rebuild is not one of them.

questions.text: Amrita Devi Bishnoi sacrificed her life to save trees.
questions.explanation: Amrita Devi Bishnoi sacrificed her life in 1731 to protect Khejri trees in Rajasthan.

questions.correctAnswer: Development that meets present needs without compromising future generations' ability to meet their needs.
questions.explanation: Sustainable development balances economic growth with environmental protection for future generations.

questions.text: The Ganga Action Plan was launched in year ________.
questions.explanation: Ganga Action Plan was launched in 1985 to reduce pollution and clean the Ganga river.
